purpose: Verify the three findings from the previous run were addressed: (1) AC-09 doctor flag for legacy config, (2) AC-06 absolute-path-outside-repo guard, (3) AC-06 symlink-escape guard.

changes_landed.summary: Added checkLegacyConfig() that returns a warn-status row when hasOldSchema() is true. The row is omitted entirely on fresh installs so doctor doesn't grow a permanent 'Legacy Config: clean' line. Suggestion map gained a `Legacy Config` entry pointing at --migrate-yes / KODE_REVIEW_MIGRATE_YES=1.

Added vi.mock entry for hasOldSchema; updated setupDefaults() to mockHasOldSchema(false). Three new tests cover: row omitted when fresh, row present with warn + correct details when legacy, and graceful handling when hasOldSchema() throws (corrupt store).

Added two new tests: 'read_file refuses absolute paths that resolve outside the repo root' and 'read_file refuses symlinks whose target resolves outside the repo root'. Symlink test self-skips when the test process can't create symlinks (EPERM/EACCES/ENOENT) so it never silently passes on a host where the underlying defence isn't reachable.

verification.method: Re-ran S4 (legacy-config + --doctor) against the rebuilt CLI in a sandboxed HOME.
verification.observed_cli_output: ! Legacy Config: Pre-1.0 (opencode-era) config detected — migrate before running reviews\n   Run `kode-review --migrate-yes` or set KODE_REVIEW_MIGRATE_YES=1. This wipes the old config, watch state, and indexer Docker volumes (irreversible).
verification.negative_check: Re-ran S1 (fresh sandbox) — confirmed 'Legacy Config' row is absent. Doctor stays clean for new users.

verification.test_name: read_file refuses absolute paths that resolve outside the repo root
read_file refuses symlinks whose target resolves outside the repo root
verification.assertion: After `symlink('/etc/passwd', repoRoot/sneaky-link.txt)`, readFile.execute on 'sneaky-link.txt' rejects with /Path traversal/.
verification.platform_caveat: Test self-skips on EPERM/EACCES/ENOENT so it doesn't silently pass on platforms where it can't construct the attack.

static_analysis.lint_repo_wide: 1 pre-existing error (src/output/parser.ts: no-useless-escape) and 8 pre-existing warnings — all unrelated to this change

summary.verdict: PASS — all three findings from the previous acceptance run are fixed and verified end-to-end. Test suite grew from 595 → 600.
